message:
feat(connectors): add OpenClaw connector for session log ingestion

Implement a new connector for OpenClaw, an AI coding agent that stores
JSONL session logs at ~/.openclaw/agents/openclaw/sessions/*.jsonl.

The connector handles OpenClaw's discriminated-union line format where
each line has a "type" field (session, message, model_change,
thinking_level_change, custom). Message lines wrap their content in a
nested "message" object with role and content fields.

Key implementation details:
- Parses session metadata from "session" type lines (model, timestamp)
- Extracts user/assistant messages from "message" type lines
- Handles content arrays via flatten_content for tool_use blocks
- Supports incremental scanning via file_modified_since checks
- Integrates with franken_detection_for_connector for agent detection
- Discovers session directories under configurable scan roots with
  fallback to the default ~/.openclaw path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
